seo.title: HeartLink | Private Matchmaking & Family Advisory
seo.description: HeartLink is an invite-only matchmaking and holistic family advisory led by Gopi Shah and Alpa Apoorva.

hero.title: Where two legacies become one.
hero.description: Private matchmaking and whole-family counsel, personally architected for those who understand that marriage is not a transaction. It is a generational decision.
hero.note: No public directory · No algorithmic matching · Absolute discretion
hero.privacyNote: A protected global circle. Identity is revealed only with mutual consent.

registry.title: Exclusivity is not a promise. It is an operating principle.
registry.description: At any single period, HeartLink strictly limits its active global registry to a maximum of 30 to 50 applications. Every introduction, conversation and reassessment is structured exclusively by Gopi Shah, protecting the depth of judgment that cannot be delegated or automated.
registry.linkText: Meet the woman behind every introduction

advantage.title: Beyond discovery. Toward discernment.
advantage.description: Most platforms increase the number of people you encounter. HeartLink increases the quality of the decision you make.

rows.subject: Selection logic
rows.explanation: The intelligence behind who enters your consideration.

rows.subject: Privacy protocol
rows.explanation: How identity and intent are protected.

philosophy.quote: “Compatibility begins with two people. Enduring harmony requires an understanding of the worlds they each bring with them.”

dimensions.title: Selection. Courtship. Family.
dimensions.description: HeartLink combines the eye of a master curator with therapeutic intelligence, guiding the relationship and the family system around it.

cards.label: 01 · Curation
cards.title: A smaller, more meaningful field.
cards.description: Prospects are selected through personality, priorities, social context, family dynamics and long-horizon compatibility.

cards.label: 02 · Counsel
cards.title: The conversation after chemistry.
cards.description: Emotional and relationship guidance helps couples move from possibility to informed commitment without performance or pressure.

cards.label: 03 · Continuity
cards.title: Two families, thoughtfully integrated.
cards.description: Pre-marital, family and post-marital support protects the transition well beyond the wedding.
